ham.subject: Your Weekly Highlights – Exclusive Deals Inside
ham.body:
Hello there,

We hope you’re having a fantastic week! Here’s what’s new in our store:

• 20% off on all summer collections – only till Sunday.
• Free shipping on orders above ₹999.
• New arrivals: Trendy wristwatches, stylish scarves, and more.

Aapko ye offers pasand aayenge. Click <URL> to shop now and enjoy these savings.

Thank you for being a part of our community!

Best regards,

The Fashion Hub Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Action Required – Unpaid Delivery Fee for Your Order
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Your FedEx shipment (Tracking No: 1234567890) was not delivered because the delivery fee of ₹150 remains unpaid. If we do not receive payment within the next 24 hours, the package will be returned to the sender and you may incur additional charges.

To avoid cancellation, please verify and pay the outstanding fee immediately. Click <URL> to complete the payment. This link will take you to our secure payment gateway.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

FedEx Customer Support
